applicability_notes: Composite unary activation: hardsigmoid(x) = clamp(x/6 + 0.5, 0, 1). Single-input, single-output elementwise op; fusable into preceding matmul/conv via UnaryWithParam activation lists where supported. Golden source maps 'hardsigmoid' directly to torch.nn.functional.hardsigmoid.; ttnn_replacement: ttnn.hardsigmoid(input_tensor); constraints: {'layout': 'TILE_LAYOUT required for unary eltwise kernels', 'dtype': ['bfloat16', 'bfloat8_b', 'float32'], 'accuracy': 'pcc >= 0.9999 vs torch golden (per unit test); bfloat8_b inputs round-tripped through ttnn for golden comparison'}

placement_observations.source: unit test: ttnn.from_torch(in_data1, dtype=ttnn_dtype, layout=ttnn.TILE_LAYOUT, device=device) with default memory_config (DRAM interleaved); output inherits input memory config
